codeReview.summary: Complete and correct implementation of the Tree/Forest module. The code provides Forest construction from flat tension data with O(n) DFS-based cycle detection, all required traversals (DFS pre/post-order, BFS), and comprehensive query operations (subtree, ancestors, siblings, descendants, find, depth). All 34 new tests pass along with the full 116 test suite. Performance target achieved (~4ms for 1000 tensions, well under the 100ms threshold). Code follows all documented conventions: thiserror for errors, derives on public types, no unwrap in library code, comprehensive doc comments.

summary: The foundation-tree feature is fully implemented and validated. The Tree/Forest module provides correct forest construction from flat tension data, rejects self-references and circular references with clear error messages, handles orphans and loose tensions consistently, and provides all required traversal and query operations. Performance is excellent (25x faster than target). All tests pass, clippy is clean, formatting is clean. No blocking or non-blocking issues identified. The worker followed all documented conventions and skill procedures correctly.
